description: Initialize the velocity or extra variable a rigid block. Velocities are applied to the centroids of rigid blocks. The range over which the item is applied can be limited by providing a range .

keywords.name: extra
keywords.description: Set block extra variable in slot \(i\) to a . If not given, the default slot is 1

keywords.name: rvelocity
keywords.description: Set initial rotational velocity to v .

keywords.name: rvelocity-x
keywords.description: Set x-component of the rotational velocity.

keywords.name: velocity
keywords.description: Set initial velocity in the \(x\) -, \(y\) -, and \(z\) -directions to v .

keywords.name: kwd:add
keywords.description: Add the specified value to the existing value.

keywords.name: kwd:gradient
keywords.description: Apply a gradient to the scalar-value provided.

keywords.name: kwd:local
keywords.description: Specify that the value supplied for the keyword is in the local coordinate system of the gridpoint (if any). By default values are initialize in the global system. This keyword cannot be used with the following keywords of the block initialize command: extra .

keywords.name: kwd:multiply
keywords.description: Multiply the existing value by the specified value.

keywords.name: kwd:vary
keywords.description: Apply a linear variation to the scalar-value provided. Set initial velocity in the \(z\) -direction.
